perks.summary: run the VSS incident-notification webhook relay (fans incidents out to Slack / Dashboard backends)
render a VSS incident payload into the Slack Block Kit blocks + OpenClaw Dashboard markdown the relay would post (offline)
create a realtime alert rule on Alert Bridge (POST /api/v1/realtime) — Workflow D
list active realtime alert rules from Alert Bridge (GET /api/v1/realtime) — Workflow D
delete (stop) a realtime alert rule on Alert Bridge by rule ID (DELETE /api/v1/realtime/<id>) — Workflow D
